values: The carpenter's workshop is idle because there is no raw material to shape
We are building new shelters and the lumber supply has dried up
The bowyer needs shafts and the woodcutter broke his axe last week
Repairs to the palisade cannot wait and the timber stores are empty
The wagon broke down and the wheelwright has nothing to rebuild with
The herbalist needs binding materials and the usual sources are picked clean
A bridge upstream washed out and needs replacing before the rains return
The charcoal kiln needs feeding and the woodlot is bare
We promised construction materials to a neighboring settlement and came up short
Scaffolding for the new watchtower requires materials nobody set aside
The boatwright has three hulls waiting and not a plank to finish them
Rope supplies are gone. Without them, half the settlement's work stops
The fuel stores for winter are dangerously low and the days are getting shorter
Someone used the emergency timber reserves for a barn. Now there are no reserves
Everything in this settlement is built from the same material and it all needs maintaining
